items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 55:1
items.html: Malchut of YESHSUT that the ten Sefirot of Nekudim emanated from is the primordial female to the worlds. (Inner Light, Item 6)
